channel.title: PhD Candidates on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.description: Recent content in PhD Candidates on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.copyright: ©{year}, NTU IoT Sensing Group. All Rights Reserved

item.title: Linshan Jiang
item.description: Linshan Jiang Position: PhD Candidate Contact: linshanjiangcn@gmail.com Bio: Linshan Jiang is a Ph.D. candidate at SCSE of NTU. He received his bachelor degree in Communication Engineering from Southern University of Science and Technology, China, in 2016. His research interests include secure and privacy in AIoT system, non-functional requirements of IoT. Publication: https://scholar.google.com.sg/citations?user=S01E5-cAAAAJ&hl=en Research projects: Privacy-preserving sensing in AIoT LoRa radio sensing

item.title: Qun Song
item.description: Qun Song Position: PhD Candidate Contact: song0167@ntu.edu.sg Bio: Song Qun received B.S. (2018) in Computer Science from Nankai University. Currently, she is a Ph.D. student co-supervised by Asst Prof. Rui Tan (SCSE) and Asst Prof. Yan Xu (EEE) under the Energy Research Institute @ NTU (ERI@N). Her ongoing research focuses on constructing secure and efficient machine learning systems for edge devices and autonomous machines as well as power grid control systems.

item.title: Wenjie Luo
item.description: Wenjie Luo Position: PhD Student Contact: wenjie0057@gmail.com Bio: I received B.E. from NTU in 2015 and was admitted as a full-time research student at School of Computer Science and Engineering in 2019. My research interest isexploiting physical knowledge for AIoT. Personal website: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wen-jie-luo-258899b3/ Research projects: Acoustic sensing

item.title: Rongrong Wang
item.description: Rongrong Wang Position: PhD Student, Research Associate Contact: rrwang@ntu.edu.sg Bio: I received B.E. (2013) from Northwestern Polytechnical University in China M.S. (2017) from Nanyang Technological University. I am currently a Ph.D student in NTU. My research interest is advanced sensing and smart CPS environment. Publication: Control of Air Free-Cooled Data Centers in Tropics via Deep Reinforcement Learning. A Testbed and Data Yields for Studying Data Center Energy Efficiency and Reliability.

item.title: Siyuan Zhou
item.description: Siyuan Zhou Position: PhD Student, Research Associate Contact: siyuan.zhou@ntu.edu.sg Bio: I am currently a Ph.D student in school of computer science and engineering, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore. My currently research focuses on embedded deep visual sensing in industrial IoT. Research projects: Acoustic and imagery sensing

item.title: Dongfang Guo
item.description: Dongfang Guo Position: PhD Student, Research Associate Contact: dongfang.guo@ntu.edu.sg Bio: I received my B.Eng. degree from University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, and my M.Sc. degree from Nanyang Technological University, Singapore. My research interests lie in the field of Internet of Things and Cyber-Physical Systems. Research projects: LoRa radio sensing Acoustic and imagery sensing

item.title: Jiale Chen
item.description: Jiale Chen Position: PhD Student, Research Associate Contact: +65 88708195 (Mobile phone) jiale.chen@ntu.edu.sg Bio: I am now a research associate in HP/NTU Lab. I received my Master degree from Hong Kong University of Science and Technology in 2019. I got my bachelor degree from Southern China University of Technology in 2018. Research projects: Acoustic and imagery sensing
